title: Wham Crystal 80L Box & Lid (Pack 2, Leprechaun Green)
features: MULTIPURPOSE STORAGE: Ideal for decluttering your home, office, or workspace, these Wham Crystal storage boxes provide an all-round convenient solution for organising toys, clothes, shoes & more.
AMPLE CAPACITY: This set includes 1 plastic storage boxes, each measuring W 28.5cm x L 48.5cm x H 41cm internally with a 80L capacity.
SPACE-SAVING DESIGN - These large size storage containers are stackable when in use with the lids clipped on to save floor space, and nestable when empty for compact storage.
SECURE CLIP-ON LIDS: These storage boxes feature a design with integrated handles that clip-on firmly, ensuring that your contents remain protected and safely stored away.
MADE IN THE UK: Proudly manufactured in Britain with premium quality, BPA-free polypropylene, these plastic boxes with lids are built to last, ensuring your storage needs are met long-term.
description: These Wham Crystal plastic storage boxes with lids are the perfect solution to help you organise and declutter your living or working spaces. Ideal for storing toys, bedding, tools, winter clothes & more, these containers feature lids with integrated handles for added convenience and safety. When not in use, these nestable storage containers can be easily nested inside one another, offering an excellent space-saving solution. Crafted in the UK from high quality, BPA-free plastic. - Set of 1 x 80L plastic storage boxes with lids - Dimensions (external) H 42cm x L 60cm x W 40cm - Dimensions (internal) H 41cm x L 48.5cm x W 28.5cm - Made with premium quality, BPA-free polypropylene - Made in the UK - Space-saving design - all boxes are stackable when lids are clipped on, and nestable when empty - Ideal for decluttering your home, office, or workspace
